title: Demon Nether
description: a mod that adds new features to the nether around the acspect of a demon's orginaly made for wildborn smp
body:
this mod will add more features to the nether and around the accpect of **demon's**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

this mod will add

-Ore Detector

-infernal matirals "new ore and ingot"

-new decration block's

-new advanced block

-new bioms to explore **-not in demo**

-new mobs **- not in demo**

-and LORE -**not in demo**

AND MORE

</details>
